summary: Implemented --yes-gated real installer path. CLI now requires --yes for real file writes; dry-run remains unchanged. Added temp-dir tests for creation, rejection, and all-or-nothing conflict behavior.

files_changed.summary: Add --yes arg, content helpers, and real install handler
Update rejection tests; add 3 new tests for --yes behavior
Document --yes flag and real install example

acceptance.item: Safety check blocks unsafe plans before writing
No real repo writes during tests

risks.description: Non-skill install files receive placeholder content rather than full PowerShell scripts.
risks.recommended_review: Decide whether placeholder content is acceptable or if full script content should be embedded.

risks.description: Tiny window between check_install_safety and apply_install_plan where a file could appear.
risks.recommended_review: apply_install_plan preflight already provides second-layer protection; acceptable for CLI tool.

deviations.reason: Content generation fit cleanly in CLI layer without touching core.py

open_questions: Should non-skill install files (PowerShell scripts, docs) get full embedded content or remain placeholders?
